message:
test(fcp-core): pin IntegrityLevel + ConfidentialityLevel zone-derived security-level matrix (flywheel_connectors-z8agn)

Bead asks for ZoneSecurityLevel ordering + Display pinning. No type
literally named ZoneSecurityLevel exists in fcp-core; the closest
zone-derived security-level analogues are IntegrityLevel +
ConfidentialityLevel at provenance.rs:51+105, both with
from_zone(zone) → Self, Display, Ord/PartialOrd, repr(u8) and
complementary lattice semantics (integrity flows DOWN freely, Biba;
confidentiality flows UP freely, Bell-LaPadula).

Existing isolation_level_ordering.rs covers ordering chains + zone
defaults at as_u8 granularity; this pin adds residual axes.

Coverage: per-variant Display verbatim for both 5-variant ladders,
PascalCase default-serde matrix per variant (no rename_all), Default =
Untrusted/Public (zero of each ladder), from_zone truth table per
documented zone (owner/private/work/community/public + integrity-public
maps to Untrusted), strict-dominance lattice ordering, Biba flow
predicate via integrity ≥ comparison + Bell-LaPadula via confidentiality
≥ comparison, cross-enum disjoint-bottom sentinel (both as_u8 == 0 but
distinct concepts: Untrusted = least trust vs Public = least
restriction; Display strings MUST differ), CBOR Text-scalar shape per
variant, HashMap-key behavior for audit grouping, min/max endpoints.

18 tests green via CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-p1-z8agn cargo test -p
fcp-core --test zone_security_level_ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
